chapter_title.en: The Limits of Ablution, Its Order and Reward

text: 100 - وَقَالَ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «فَرَضَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى اَلنَّاسِ فِي اَلْوُضُوءِ أَنْ تَبْدَأَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ بِبَاطِنِ ذِرَاعِهَا وَ اَلرَّجُلُ بِظَاهِرِ اَلذِّرَاعِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.100 - Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) said:
"Allah (swt), Mighty and Majestic, has prescribed for people in wudu that a woman should begin with the inner part of her arm, while a man should begin with the outer part of his arm”.
